digest.greeting: Friday, July 10, Jean. Today has 9 visible calendar blocks, anchored by the CoE sync, Toggl touchpoint, EPMO EOW check-in, Project pipeline, Executive Project Status deck, Sprint 13 review, and the BD Portfolio Touchpoint with Janet. There are 10 carried-over items and 3 reminders to clear. The main priorities are to keep the PM operating structure from splintering, use the afternoon EPMO/pipeline/deck sequence to settle ownership and status, make a decision path for DNC enhancements, and protect the ICE Preparedness risks before they push launch timing further. Teams is rate-limited this morning, so Teams context is limited to Outlook-surfaced Teams notifications and corroborated dashboard history.

items.label: Turn the PM team index, Planner, and weekly deck into one operating structure
items.detail: Keep shaping the Loop index, Planner updates, and weekly executive deck into one operating rhythm before today's EOW, pipeline, and deck meetings create more parallel status surfaces.

items.label: Start LA AI change-management testing
items.detail: This is still open from the LA AI reminder. Use the 9:00 AM AI tool test block for a clean first pass if it still needs hands-on validation.

items.label: Send Eugenia the PE project list and SOP template
items.detail: Send Eugenia the PE project list plus the agreed SOP template so the expected level of detail is clear before more portfolio-review follow-ups land.

items.label: Check the Mental Health Expansion charter deliverable
items.detail: Planner still shows Maria's draft charter as not started after its due date. Confirm whether it is ready for stakeholder review or needs an owner/date reset.

items.label: Capture the Amazon Connect decisions and blockers
items.detail: Yesterday's Amazon Connect agenda centered on open items, blockers, prior-week actions, and decisions needed. Capture what changed and what still needs a decision before the week closes.

items.label: Close the BCP/Incident Response follow-up path
items.detail: Use the Incident Response reminders and Lucia context to decide what needs to be sent to Bill, what can be shared as a PR-ready brief, and what remains async after yesterday's BCP/IR touchpoint.

items.label: Find a new Marketing portfolio-review slot for next week
items.detail: Yesterday's Marketing portfolio review was canceled because Paige could not attend and Lucia was overbooked. Keep the next-week slot on the radar before Monday fills in.

items.label: Track the Legal Change Management requirement change
items.detail: Keep the new CLO approval path and status approach visible before the next implementation discussion so the change does not disappear into thread history.

items.label: Verify the Salesforce password-reset emails
items.detail: If Jean initiated the reset, finish it within the 24-hour window; if not, treat it as an account-security follow-up.

items.label: Review the new Phase 2 intake alert
items.detail: Janet sent a new Phase 2 intake alert late yesterday. Review the request and decide whether it needs routing, ownership, or a portfolio follow-up before the 2:30 PM pipeline sync.

items.label: Enviar correo a Bill sobre Incident Response
items.detail: Send Bill the Incident Response context before the afternoon meeting stack makes the follow-up harder to close.

items.label: Verificar Toggl y notificar a Sara
items.detail: Use the 11:00 AM Toggl touchpoint to verify the issue, then send Sara the clean status or blocker.

items.label: Enviar notas de reunión a Tudo Bem
items.detail: Send the notes before today's EOW and project-pipeline blocks create new follow-ups for the team.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times are shown in Jean's Outlook working-day context. The strongest focus window is 9:00 AM; after 1:00 PM the day runs as a tight operating-review stack.

items.label: Focus time: AI tool test
items.detail: Best protected slot for LA AI testing and any reminder cleanup that needs concentration.

items.label: CoE Sync Jean
items.detail: Mar organizes this with David accepted. Use it to keep CoE follow-ups connected to the PM operating structure.

items.label: Toggl touchpoint
items.detail: Directly tied to today's reminder to verify Toggl and notify Sara.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Ninety-minute buffer before the afternoon stack; use it for reminder sends, DNC review, or EOW prep.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Sara moved this earlier and added Nadia so programmatic updates can be included. Bring the few decisions and blockers that need executive alignment.

items.label: Canceled: I-90 EC Overview
items.detail: Cancellation is visible on the calendar; no action unless the cancellation creates a downstream dependency.

items.label: Project pipeline (EPMO/IT weekly sync)
items.detail: Agenda includes new intake prioritization, BA assignment, active-project priority changes, UAT status, and workflow items.

items.label: Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Review and update the weekly Executive Projects deck with Jhara, Mar, Nicolas, Thiago, and Laura.

items.label: IT Lifity Sprint #13 Review
items.detail: Sprint review with IT, PMs, and stakeholders for user stories in the deployment plan.

items.label: BD Portfolio Touchpoint & Transition
items.detail: New Janet meeting created from yesterday's transition follow-up; use it to clarify ownership and next steps before Monday's BD portfolio review.

items.label: Use the EOW, pipeline, and deck meetings as one operating review
items.detail: Today's 1:00 PM to 3:30 PM stack can either clarify ownership or create duplicate tracking. Bring the same priority list through EOW, intake/BA assignment, executive deck updates, and Sprint 13.

items.label: Decide the DNC enhancements path
items.detail: Sergio's thread now frames two paths for DNC reporting and broader enhancement scope. Decide whether this stays as a lightweight COE/backlog route or needs a larger project path before the disagreement over effort/timing grows.

items.label: Reset the ICE Preparedness launch-risk view
items.detail: Jhara's Asana status shows name-lock delay, legal-doc timing risk, and task-set/object scope concerns. Bring those risks into the executive view before the likely launch window drifts further.

items.label: Prepare the BD transition ask for Janet
items.detail: The 4:00 PM Janet touchpoint is new and should convert yesterday's scheduling follow-up into an owner, transition path, and next Monday portfolio-review setup.

items.label: Review the new NTA Package Tracker share
items.detail: Asana shared the NTA Package Tracker with Jean. Decide whether it is simply FYI or whether it needs to be connected to the PM operating rhythm.

items.label: Reply or align on the DNC enhancements thread
items.detail: Sergio, Ben, Anu, Mauricio, Sara, Mar, David, and Javier are on the thread. The useful next step is not status; it is deciding the route and priority for DNC reporting, UX, and HTC automation.

items.label: Follow Lucia's PR-brief signal on Incident Response
items.detail: A Teams notification from Lucia says the Incident Response context may be useful as a PR-firm brief. Fold that into the Bill follow-up if the message needs to serve both internal and external-readiness purposes.

items.label: Shelley is OOO next week
items.detail: Monday's calendar shows Shelley OOO from July 13 through July 17. Anything needing Shelley should be routed or time-boxed before it blocks the week.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Start-of-week admin block before the portfolio work begins.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Useful window for carrying over anything not closed in today's meeting stack.

items.label: BD Portfolio Review
items.detail: Review active BD portfolio status, risks, blockers, and new intake with Matthew and Anthony. Today's Janet transition touchpoint should feed this.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda is portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps; good place to revisit the Mental Health charter if it remains open.

reminderHistory.text: Enviar correo a Bill sobre Incident Response
Verificar Toggl y notificar a Sara
Enviar notas de reunión a Tudo Bem
